Author: Ehno
Name: PenumbraSort
Description: Best for a loose, unsorted mod list - takes it from chaos to a reasonable folder structure in one pass. If you've already built your own folder scheme, this probably isn't for you: auto-categorization is based on equipment/customization data and won't reproduce a hand-tuned taxonomy, and animation/skeleton/UI/tool mods can't be auto-sorted at all (Penumbra doesn't expose that data). Always review before applying. Note: Penumbra's API doesn't support deleting folders, so folders left empty after a sort must be removed manually in Penumbra's own mod list.
Punchline: Turns a loose, unsorted mod list into a real folder structure - not for already-organized libraries.
